text:
(In reply to Mateusz Guzik from comment #5)

Thanks Mateusz. That's brilliant. I haven't upgraded yet, but this will make it one less thing to track moving forward when I do.

Incidentally, I did try to find MFC information from the GIT commit log, but I couldn't find it like I could with SVN.

Cheers! Jamie
